committee.name: Charity Comittee
committee.evaluation: No progress so far, no transferred emails but excited to see progress!

personal.additionalNotes: I have had people reach out from division 9. I spent my time reaserching about UNICEF, to give Haritha the best advice on how to pursue becoming a UNICEF Champion! She was also very interested in becoming a LTG, Which I helped guide her through the process when she reached out.It is difficult to find contact information, if there is any help I can receive to require contact information in Division 9 It would be much appreciated. I have loved the role and intend to become further enveloped in it as time goes on!

clubs.problems: Need to find a sponsor and a Kiwanis Club near them that would sponsor them for the next school year.
clubs.report: Excited to start a club, want to hit the ground running next year so this month will be used to coordinate a sponsor and introduce Builder's Club to St. Louis.

committee.name: Membership Development Committee
committee.evaluation: Trained district board on the International Charter Champion's role and how to proceed with chartering clubs in this respective division. We will be meeting as a committee next time to make specific resources available for all members to use to charter more clubs and also retain clubs.
